page.primary_keyword: marbella yacht charter f1 grand prix 2027
page.title: Book a Marbella Yacht Charter for the 2027 F1 Grand Prix Weekend

data.meta_description: Book a Marbella yacht charter for the 2027 F1 Grand Prix weekend. Watch the race from your private boat in Puerto Banús. Prices from €749 for 2 hours.
data.summary: Secure your Marbella yacht charter for the 2027 F1 Grand Prix weekend. Depart from Puerto Banús, watch the race from the water, and enjoy included drinks and skipper.
key_facts: Charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella
Prices from €749 for 2 hours (Tier A boats)
All charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and insurance
Fleet includes 12m–29m yachts for up to 12 guests
Jet ski included free on Mangusta 80 charters (4h min)
Book early – F1 weekend demand is high

faq.q: Can I watch the F1 Grand Prix from a Marbella yacht charter?
faq.a: Yes. Many guests anchor near Puerto Banús or along the coast to watch the race on onboard screens or from the deck with views of the Mediterranean. The atmosphere in the marina during the F1 weekend is electric.

faq.q: Which boats are available for the 2027 F1 Grand Prix weekend?
faq.a: Our fleet ranges from the 6.4m Mariah SX21 (5 pax) to the 29m Ferretti 94 (12 pax). Popular choices include the Astondoa 40 (€749/2h) and the Mangusta 80 (€4,719/4h, jet ski included).

faq.q: How far in advance should I book a yacht for the F1 weekend?
faq.a: We recommend booking at least 3–4 months ahead. The 2027 F1 weekend is expected to draw large crowds, and our fleet books out quickly, especially larger yachts and those with jet skis.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and additional drinks. Our standard provision covers soft drinks, beer, wine, and cava. Let us know if you need catering upgrades.

faq.q: Do you offer multi-day charters for the F1 weekend?
faq.a: Yes, we can arrange multi-day charters on request. Contact us via WhatsApp for custom itineraries, overnight stays, and extended cruising along the Costa del Sol.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on race day?
faq.a: Safety is our priority. If conditions are unsafe, we will work with you to reschedule or offer a full refund. Marbella typically enjoys calm seas in summer, but we monitor forecasts closely.

faq.q: How do I book a yacht for the 2027 F1 Grand Prix?
faq.a: Use our online booking system or send a WhatsApp message. Provide your preferred boat, date, and duration. We will confirm availability and send a payment link. Early booking is advised.

data.body_html:
Book a Marbella yacht charter for the 2027 F1 Grand Prix weekend and experience the race from the water. Departing from Puerto Banús, our fleet of motor yachts and speedboats offers private, all-inclusive trips for groups of 5 to 12 guests. Prices start at €749 for 2 hours, with licensed skipper, drinks, and snacks included. Secure your spot early — demand peaks during the Grand Prix.

Why choose a Marbella yacht charter for the F1 weekend?

The 2027 F1 Grand Prix brings thousands of visitors to the Costa del Sol. Watching from a private yacht gives you freedom, comfort, and front-row views of the action. Anchor near the marina, watch on onboard screens, or simply enjoy the buzz from the deck. With our all-inclusive pricing, there are no surprises — just show up and relax.

Our fleet for the 2027 F1 Grand Prix

We offer 18 boats, from 6.4m speedboats to 29m luxury yachts. All depart from Puerto Banús, a 5-minute walk from the marina restaurants and bars. Popular choices for the F1 weekend include:

  • Astondoa 40 – 12.5m, 9 pax, €749/2h, €2,299/8h
  • Azimut 39 – 12.5m, 11 pax, €749/2h, €2,299/8h
  • Mangusta 80 – 24m, 12 pax, €4,719/4h (jet ski included)
  • Ferretti 94 – 29m, 12 pax, pricing on request
  • Speedboat – 7m, 6 pax, pricing on request

For full details, visit our boat rental Marbella page.

What’s included in every charter

Every booking includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees. You can bring your own food and extra drinks if you wish.

How to book your yacht for the 2027 F1 Grand Prix

Booking is simple. Choose your boat, date, and duration via our website or send a WhatsApp message. We will confirm availability and send a secure payment link. Early booking is strongly recommended — our fleet books out weeks before the race weekend.

Nearby destinations to explore

Your charter can include stops at Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, or along the Golden Mile. Cruise to Estepona or Sotogrande for lunch, or anchor off Cabopino for a swim. The Costa del Sol offers 300 days of sunshine and calm seas — ideal for a day on the water.

Frequently asked questions

Can I watch the F1 Grand Prix from a Marbella yacht charter?

Yes. Many guests anchor near Puerto Banús or along the coast to watch the race on onboard screens or from the deck with views of the Mediterranean. The atmosphere in the marina during the F1 weekend is electric.

Which boats are available for the 2027 F1 Grand Prix weekend?

Our fleet ranges from the 6.4m Mariah SX21 (5 pax) to the 29m Ferretti 94 (12 pax). Popular choices include the Astondoa 40 (€749/2h) and the Mangusta 80 (€4,719/4h, jet ski included).

How far in advance should I book a yacht for the F1 weekend?

We recommend booking at least 3–4 months ahead. The 2027 F1 weekend is expected to draw large crowds, and our fleet books out quickly, especially larger yachts and those with jet skis.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras.

Can I bring my own food and drinks?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and additional drinks. Our standard provision covers soft drinks, beer, wine, and cava. Let us know if you need catering upgrades.

Do you offer multi-day charters for the F1 weekend?

Yes, we can arrange multi-day charters on request. Contact us via WhatsApp for custom itineraries, overnight stays, and extended cruising along the Costa del Sol.

What happens if the weather is bad on race day?

Safety is our priority. If conditions are unsafe, we will work with you to reschedule or offer a full refund. Marbella typically enjoys calm seas in summer, but we monitor forecasts closely.

How do I book a yacht for the 2027 F1 Grand Prix?

Use our online booking system or send a WhatsApp message. Provide your preferred boat, date, and duration. We will confirm availability and send a payment link. Early booking is advised.
